_meta.description: Shared semantic hub — controlled vocabulary across five dimensions. Every pipeline entity maps to a point in this space via concept_tags (declared in each skeleton_profile.json). Cross-system links are DERIVED from shared coordinates (COMPOSITION_SPEC.md §4, §6). Slowly-changing: extend the vocab as new pipelines arrive; never rename existing terms.

product.description: The instrument/exposure being measured — the primary join key across systems.

measure.description: What kind of quantity. The cross-system law lives here: a flow leads/accumulates into a stock (COMPOSITION_SPEC.md §6). class ∈ {stock, flow, count}; unit ∈ {value, volume, balance}.

lender.description: Lender / issuer type. 'all' = system-total (the only resolved value for system-aggregate pipelines like SIBC and ATM/POS totals).

geography.description: Spatial resolution. Mostly 'national' today; metro/non_metro/state surface only when an ingestion resolves them.

economic_role.description: The real-world reading — what activity this credit/infrastructure finances. Powers the relational insights (rotation/divergence, signals/README.md). Optional: null = tagging gap, not an error. A role is a grouping label (textbook classification, no source); transmission claims built on a role are channels (§2a).

driver_concepts.description: Exogenous driver references used as the source_concept of causal channels (COMPOSITION_SPEC.md §2a). Not entity tags — these name the external forces the channels originate from.
